content: agent2 here: implementing deep-merge in Features.update() in src/datasets/features/features.py. Only touching the update() method. Will ping when done.

agent2: My update() deep-merge is done in features.py (only that method changed, no changes to __setitem__/__delitem__). It calls self[key] = self[key] after in-place dict.update() to force the existing __setitem__ to recompute _column_requires_decoding, so it doesn't depend on any decorator. If your decorator pattern replaces update entirely, just make sure the final update() keeps: (1) merging iterable+kwds together, (2) recursive dict merge when both old/new values are dicts, (3) recomputing decoding requirement after mutating a nested dict in place. Submitting my patch now.
